title: Southwestern Railway Class 455 Pack for MTR
description: Includes the class 455/7 and 455/8 for the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod. The trains are in Southwestern Railway (SWR) livery.
body:
The British Rail Class 455 is a type of electric multiple unit (EMU) passenger train built by BREL between 1982 and 1985. It is operated on suburban services in Greater London and Surrey by South Western Railway, as well as formerly by Southern. They are currently being replaced by the Class 701 EMU on the South Western Railway network.

This pack includes 2 subclasses, the 455/7 and 455/8. The train model was made by Georgecat19, further improved and enhanced by LX9702 and then remodelled and retextured by Skywalker_6517. The train currently does not feature a cab. This pack works for Minecraft Transit Railway versions 3 and 4.

Original project:
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/british-rail-class-321

For MTR4 users:
- Please spawn the train as 4 car units
- The train does not support seats and doorways currently
